0.q: DgWRKY4 is a positive regulatory gene responding to salt stress, via advancing photosynthetic capacity, promoting the operation of reactive oxygen species-scavenging system, maintaining membrane stability

1.q: photosynthesis of transgenic chrysanthemum was less inhibited by salt stress than WT... DgWRKY4 is a positive regulatory gene responding to salt stress, via advancing photosynthetic capacity

2.q: through regulating the expression of these antioxidant-related genes, overexpressed DgMBF1 respond to against ROS persecution. Less H2O2 and O2− contents and higher antioxidant enzyme activities would eliminate stress-induced ROS.

4.q: Overexpression of DgWRKY2 increases the antioxidant enzyme activity of transgenic chrysanthemum to counteract injury from ROS, and the accumulation of H2O2 and O2− in the transgenic lines was much lower than that of the WT.

5.q: a series of up-regulated stress-related genes were also found in transgenic chrysanthemum ... DgCuZnSOD, DgCAT, DgAPX, DgP5CS, DgDREB1A, DgDREB2A, DgCSD1, and DgCSD2 were monitored
